title: rubus thelybatos
intro: Rubus thelybatos, also known as the Greek bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus thelybatos include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams for topical application.
